translations.en: a man with sea-blue eyes and a warm smile.
translations.zh: 一位有著海藍色眼睛和溫暖笑容的男子。

translations.en: "Welcome back, my friend
"Welcome, welcome, friend
. Here for @lodging this fine $T?"
"@Timothy." He flashes a friendly smile and nods.
translations.zh: 「@提默。」他閃現一個友好的微笑，點點頭。

translations.en: "I'm named after my @uncle. He was a kind soul."
translations.zh: 「在下是以在下的@叔父命名的，他是個善良的人。」

translations.en: "Sir Timothy Enders Daverstock. He was a famous @knight in these parts."
translations.zh: 「提默·安德斯·戴沃斯托克爵士，他是此地一位著名的@騎士。」

translations.en: "It is a busy one - this job, that is. I find it rewarding, though, meeting friendly faces."
translations.zh: 「這份工作很繁忙，然在下覺得很有意義，因為能見到許多友善的面孔。」

translations.en: "Maybe you want a @room, eh?"
"He is perhaps best known for his courage in @battle."
translations.zh: 「他或許以在@戰場上的勇氣最為人稱道。」

translations.en: "He once held off a score of men while his own fled to safety across a bridge."
translations.zh: 「他曾以一己之力抵擋二十名敵人，讓己方同伴得以安全撤過橋去。」

translations.en: "Farewell, friend
. Travel safely."
"Hmm... Nope, can't help you there."
"#0 gold for you to stay and have a meal, good?"
"I'm sorry, but we require cash in advance for our rooms."
You sleep in a comfortable bed...
translations.zh: 汝在舒適的床鋪上入睡……

translations.en: You wake rested and eat a large breakfast.
translations.zh: 汝醒來精神煥發，享用了一頓豐盛的早餐。

translations.en: "Good morning, have a good day."
"Perhaps some other time, then."

people.Sir Timothy Enders Daverstock: 提默·安德斯·戴沃斯托克爵士

translator_notes: 109 Timothy: 鴉爪鎮旅店掌柜，溫和親切。以名聞騎士叔父為榮。提供住宿餐食。
